subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-09
subcodes.first_line: This is a meeting, the members of which are strung together like pearls, and all the pearls are brilliant, for all are Bahá'ís.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
